response:
Mode: diagnose. Readiness: Stage 2 (model-grounded); the threshold problem is specified, but empirical validation is absent. Verdict on the proposed story: ineligible. The information gate fails because it routes on true future labels that are unavailable at moderation time; the behavior/mechanism gate also fails because clairvoyant routing replaces the supplied score-threshold mechanism. Actor, timing of threshold commitment, one-threshold constraint, and weighted-error objective can otherwise be preserved.

Faithful repair: A platform chooses one score threshold ex ante from historical conditional score distributions and error weights, before future scores and labels are realized. The threshold partitions realized scores into the two moderation outcomes. Because the conditional distributions overlap, both error types remain possible. The business question is which common threshold minimizes expected weighted classification error—not how to identify every item that will later prove harmful.

DFC-12 for the repair: Actor—platform moderation policy owner. Trigger—setting the rule for future content. Choices—one score threshold. Decision-time information—historical conditional score distributions and error weights; future scores and true labels are unknown. Stakes—expected weighted classification error. Frictions—the threshold is fixed before labels and is common. Mechanism—score partitioning creates residual errors under overlap. Trade-off—moving the threshold exchanges the two weighted error types. Counterfactual—another feasible threshold. Mapping—threshold is the decision; future label and score are uncertain states; classification is the outcome; weighted error is the objective. Evidence—the claim that the rule eliminates harmful content is unsupported. Boundaries—no perfect classification, harm elimination, long-run safety, or causal community effect is established. For this repaired framing, all six gates pass and eligibility is restored.

Evidence and scholarly limits: Validate distribution stability, label quality, error weights, and out-of-sample error before operational claims. Novelty is not assessable without literature or results. Primary remaining weakness: the proposed story's reliance on unavailable future labels; after repair, empirical transportability remains unresolved.
